# obsidian-gallery-plugin Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-10-21

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 4.9+ (Obsidian plugin requirement) + Obsidian Plugin API, yaml (for parameter parsing), DOM manipulation libraries (001-gallery-code-block)
- File system access via Obsidian Vault API, no database required (001-gallery-code-block)

## Project Structure
```
src/
tests/
```

## Commands
npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style
TypeScript 4.9+ (Obsidian plugin requirement): Follow standard conventions
